src: A multicolored sneaker with pastel purple, mint green, and cream. It has cream laces, a rounded toe, a plush lining, and a chunky sole.
edit: A woolen slipper in orange, brown, and beige hues, with fuzzy sheepskin lining, thick felt sole, elastic band, and a decorative wooden button. It features plush, textured material and handcrafted stitching.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object is on a diagonal rough concrete surface beside a rippling body of water, with trees in the background and a stone wall behind, separating the water from grass.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is angled slightly to the right on a textured asphalt road with small specks and twigs scattered on the ground. The background is blurred showing the road.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: the object is on vibrant green grass, slightly sunken, surrounded by blades, with freshly mowed grass stretching into the distance.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: the object is lying slightly off-center on a green wooden park bench with some scratches. Behind is a patch of grass and a gray gravel path.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is against a rustic red brick wall on a worn concrete sidewalk with patches and stains. The bricks have a weathered texture with visible mortar.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is on a textured concrete surface with fallen leaves, beside a shimmering body of water. Background trees have red, orange, and golden leaves. Behind is an ancient stone wall with vines, separating the water from a grassy area with autumn foliage.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is slightly angled to the right on a golden leaf-speckled road with amber and rust leaves, and twigs. The background is blurred, showing the picturesque road framed by trees. The scene captures the essence of fall.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is on a carpet of orange, red, and yellow autumn leaves, slightly embedded in the layers. Curled leaf edges frame the object, with leaves scattered into the distance, embodying fall's essence.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: A park bench with golden-brown leaves on its wooden surface, positioned slightly off-center against grass with orange and red leaves. A light gray gravel path with leaves winds behind the bench.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object is against an autumn-hued brick wall, with red, orange, and gold tones. The sidewalk has auburn leaves. The bricks are textured with patches of mortar, reflecting an autumn atmosphere.
